scripts.test:login: k6 run tests/login.js --console-output=reports/console.log 2>&1 | tee /dev/tty | sed 's/\x1B\[[0-9;?]*[A-Za-z]//g' | tr '\r' '\n' | awk '/TOTAL RESULTS/,0' | grep -v '^running\|^default' | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' > reports/results.txt
scripts.test:login:json: k6 run tests/login.js --console-output=reports/console.log --summary-export=reports/results.json 2>&1 | tee /dev/tty | sed 's/\x1B\[[0-9;?]*[A-Za-z]//g' | tr '\r' '\n' | awk '/TOTAL RESULTS/,0' | grep -v '^running\|^default' | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' > reports/results.txt
scripts.test:login:csv: k6 run tests/login.js --console-output=reports/console.log --out csv=reports/results.csv 2>&1 | tee /dev/tty | sed 's/\x1B\[[0-9;?]*[A-Za-z]//g' | tr '\r' '\n' | awk '/TOTAL RESULTS/,0' | grep -v '^running\|^default' | sed '/^[[:space:]]*$/d' > reports/results.txt
